prediction_fields.name: total_funding_allocated
prediction_fields.description: Total funding allocated to Hanyang University BK21 program for the year, including research group budgets and graduate innovation support

prediction_fields.name: graduate_scholarship_slots
prediction_fields.description: Number of monthly stipend slots funded for master's and doctoral students

prediction_fields.name: postdoc_positions
prediction_fields.description: Number of postdoctoral researcher positions funded

discussion_points: What total budget is available from the Ministry/National Research Foundation for Hanyang's BK21 program?
How are the graduate stipend levels and postdoc salary minimums (700K-1.3M KRW, 3M KRW) translated into number of slots?
What eligibility and field criteria limit the number of education research groups and thus slots allocated?

prediction_fields.name: total_funds_disbursed
prediction_fields.description: Total funds actually disbursed to education research groups and university accounts via the two-installment schedule

prediction_fields.name: evaluation_panels_convened
prediction_fields.description: Number of formal evaluation panel meetings (annual, mid-term, compliance) conducted

prediction_fields.name: consulting_sessions_held
prediction_fields.description: Number of consulting sessions provided to education research groups by the consulting committee

prediction_fields.name: compliance_checks_executed
prediction_fields.description: Number of compliance checks (document reviews, site visits) performed on participating groups

discussion_points: How efficiently are funds transferred according to the 70% March / 30% September payment schedule?
What triggers or prioritizes evaluation panels versus compliance checks?
What proportion of education research groups receive consulting vs. face sanctions?
How are budget adjustments and reallocations handled based on evaluation outcomes?

prediction_fields.name: graduate_students_supported
prediction_fields.description: Number of graduate students (master's, doctoral, doctoral candidates) who received BK21 scholarships during the year

prediction_fields.name: postdoc_researchers_supported
prediction_fields.description: Number of early-career researchers (postdoctoral) who received salary support from BK21

prediction_fields.name: publications_produced
prediction_fields.description: Total number of research publications (journal articles, conference papers) authored by BK21-supported participants

prediction_fields.name: international_conference_presentations
prediction_fields.description: Number of presentations at international conferences made by BK21 participants

discussion_points: What is the typical research output (publications, presentations) per supported graduate student or postdoc?
How many students complete their degrees and transition to employment or further research?
What proportion of supported research involves international collaboration?
To what extent do education research groups comply with mandatory reporting (e.g., self-evaluations)?

prediction_fields.name: international_research_collaboration_rate_of_bk21_participants_in_2022
prediction_fields.description: international research collaboration rate of BK21 participants in 2022

prediction_fields.name: graduate_employment_rate_of_bk21_participants_in_2022
prediction_fields.description: Graduate employment rate of BK21 participants in 2022

prediction_fields.name: employment_rate
prediction_fields.description: Employment rate of BK21 graduate participants within one year of graduation (job in any sector)

prediction_fields.name: international_collaboration_rate
prediction_fields.description: Percentage of BK21 participants involved in international research collaboration (co-authored papers, joint projects, or exchanges) during the program period

prediction_fields.name: full_time_faculty_lecture_ratio
prediction_fields.description: Ratio of graduate-level lecture hours taught by full-time faculty in BK21-supported programs

discussion_points: What factors (e.g., network, training, reputation) influence the graduate employment rate?
How do program design elements (e.g., collaboration incentives, international conference support) affect the international collaboration rate?
To what extent does the increased reliance on full-time faculty (vs. part-time) improve educational quality and research mentoring?
How do evaluation and consulting feedback loops contribute to these short/medium-term outcome improvements?

prediction_fields.name: national_st_talent_competitiveness_rank
prediction_fields.description: South Korea's rank in a global S&T talent competitiveness index (lower rank is better, e.g., 1 = top)

prediction_fields.name: high_impact_publications_per_1000_researchers
prediction_fields.description: Number of top 1% cited publications produced per 1000 full-time equivalent researchers nationally

discussion_points: How does sustained investment in graduate talent development affect national innovation capacity over a decade?
What systemic changes in research culture (integrity, collaboration, interdisciplinarity) are expected as alumni progress in their careers?
How do the dissemination of outstanding group achievements and operational know-how influence other institutions and the wider S&T ecosystem?
